trending_videos.title: Marvel Animation’s X-Men ‘97 Season 2 | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Time to get the X-Men back to the 90s. 

Marvel Animation’s #XMen97 Season 2 streams July 1, only on Disney+.

trending_videos.title: Carolina Hurricanes at Montreal Canadiens
trending_videos.description: The Carolina Hurricanes and the Montreal Canadiens play Game 4 of the Eastern Conference Finals at Bell Centre. Carolina currently leads the series 2-1. Nick Suzuki scored 101 points for Montreal, while Sebastian Aho leads Carolina with 80 points.

trending_videos.title: Disclosure Day | Final Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Believe it when you see it. Get tickets now. Disclosure Day only in theaters June 12.
______
If you found out we weren’t alone, if someone showed you, proved it to you, would that frighten you? This summer, the truth belongs to eight billion people. 
We are coming close to … Disclosure Day. 

Universal Pictures is proud to release a new original event film created and directed by Steven Spielberg. The film stars SAG winner and Oscar® nominee Emily Blunt (Oppenheimer, A Quiet Place), Emmy and Golden Globe winner Josh O’Connor (Challengers, The Crown), Oscar® winner Colin Firth (The King’s Speech, Kingsman franchise), Eve Hewson (Bad Sisters, The Perfect Couple) and two-time Oscar® nominee Colman Domingo (Sing Sing, Rustin).
 
Based on a story by Spielberg, the screenplay is by David Koepp, whose previous work with Spielberg includes the scripts for Jurassic Park, The Lost World: Jurassic Park, War of the Worlds and Indiana Jones and the Kingdom of the Crystal Skull. Combined, those film

trending_videos.description: Greg Gutfeld looks at the news of the day through a satiric lens fused with pop culture and features his takes on the day's headlines.

trending_videos.description:
X-Men 97 Breakdown! 💸 Sign up for Freecash https://freecash.com/c/f27266?sub1=screencrush_YT_r2 to start earning extra money online!

Visit the ScreenCrush Merch Store to find fan merch that we designed just for you. From T-shirts to unique accessories, find your favorites. For 15% off your first order subscribe here! https://screencrushmerch.com/pages/subscribe 

The first trailer for X-Men 97 season 2 is finally here! We break down the origin story of Apocalypse, the Kang connection you might have missed, and the new big bad of the season: Danger. There's also a heartbreaking loss for Collusus, and the (somehow) return of Wolverine.

trending_videos.title: Tampa Bay Rays at Baltimore Orioles
trending_videos.description: Tampa Bay plays Baltimore at Oriole Park at Camden Yards to end their three-game series. Steven Matz is the projected starting pitcher for the Rays while Chris Bassitt starts for the Orioles. Junior Caminero leads the Rays in home runs.

trending_videos.title: Enola Holmes 3 | Official Teaser | Netflix
trending_videos.description:
Tis I do?! The critically-acclaimed ‘Enola Holmes’ franchise has returned, taking Enola far from London, where personal and professional dreams collide on a case more tangled and treacherous than any she has faced before. Directed by Philip Barantini (the Emmy Award-winning director of ‘Adolescence’), the film stars Millie Bobby Brown, Louis Partridge, Henry Cavill, and Helena Bonham Carter. ENOLA HOLMES 3 premieres JULY 1, only on Netflix.

ENOLA HOLMES 1 and ENOLA HOLMES 2 are NOW PLAYING.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81605886

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time.

Enola Holmes 3 | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

trending_videos.title: Shooter
trending_videos.description: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

videos_without_transcripts.description: Reluctantly pressed into service again, a former military sniper plots revenge against his powerful foes after being betrayed and wounded.

superhero_and_animation.description: Superhero-themed content, particularly Marvel animations, is prominently featured.
evidence: Marvel Animation’s X-Men ‘97 Season 2 | Official Trailer
X-MEN 97 Season 2 Trailer BREAKDOWN - Marvel Easter Eggs You Missed!
superhero_and_animation.insight: There is a strong audience interest in superhero and animation content, suggesting opportunities for creators in producing related content or analysis videos.

sports.description: Sports content, especially NHL games, is trending.
evidence: Tampa Bay Rays at Baltimore Orioles
sports.insight: Live sports broadcasts and highlights continue to draw significant views, indicating a consistent demand for sports-related content.

movies_and_entertainment.description: Trailers and teasers for upcoming movies and series are popular.
movies_and_entertainment.insight: Maintaining engagement through teasers and trailers is effective for building anticipation and viewer interest.

music.description: Music content remains a staple in trending videos.
music.insight: Music videos, both official and visualizers, continue to attract views, suggesting potential in diverse music genres and innovative visual presentations.

news_and_talk_shows.description: News commentary and talk shows are present in trending content.
news_and_talk_shows.insight: There is an audience for opinion and commentary-based content, particularly on current events and news.

diverse_content_range.description: A variety of content types from different channels are trending.
diverse_content_range.implication: Channels that diversify their content offerings may increase their chances of appearing in trending lists.

brand_power.description: Established brands and media houses feature prominently.
brand_power.insight: Leveraging brand recognition can significantly enhance content visibility and engagement.

niche_analysis_content.description: High engagement with breakdowns and analysis of popular series.
niche_analysis_content.opportunity: Create detailed analysis and Easter egg breakdowns for popular shows and trailers to capture niche audiences.

localized_sports_content.description: Interest in specific sports teams and games.
localized_sports_content.opportunity: Develop localized or team-specific content for sports fans, offering in-depth analysis and commentary.

collaborative_content.description: Potential for cross-promotion between different entertainment sectors.
collaborative_content.opportunity: Explore collaborations between music, movies, and series to create unique content that taps into multiple fan bases.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
